overall.description: Gameplay footage from a fantasy RPG (Hogwarts Legacy) showing a student character with red hair exploring the Gryffindor common room and adjacent areas in a magical castle. The character walks through the warmly lit common room with stone walls and tapestries, encounters a ghost, ascends wooden and stone staircases, and enters a dormitory tower room.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gryffindor common room main hall with central fireplace

agents.ego_description: walking through the Gryffindor common room, observing the surroundings and other students sitting by the fire

notable_agents.action: student sitting on wooden bench near the tall windows

entered.detail: massive stone fireplace with burning fire and mantle decorations
large wall tapestry with red and gold heraldic designs
vertical banner with lion crest hanging from ceiling
red leather sofas and armchairs arranged around the fireplace
tall arched windows with stone tracery letting in morning light
ornate iron chandelier hanging from the high ceiling

segments.scene_description: The character explores the main Gryffindor common room, a spacious hall with high ceilings, stone walls, and warm lighting from the large fireplace and windows. Red and gold tapestries and banners decorate the walls, while leather sofas and wooden furniture are arranged around the room. Other students are seen sitting and relaxing near the fireplace and windows.

scene_state.functional_zone: archway leading to staircase with ghost encounter

events.description: transparent ghost of Nearly Headless Nick appears and walks through the stone archway ahead

agents.ego_description: approaching the stone archway and observing the ghost passing through the wall

notable_agents.action: transparent ghost in medieval ruffs walking through the stone archway

entered.detail: gothic stone archway leading to the staircase area
tall wooden cabinet with glass doors containing artifacts
wooden coat rack with hanging robes

segments.scene_description: The character approaches a stone archway at the edge of the common room where the ghost Nearly Headless Nick appears and walks through the wall. The space becomes narrower with wooden cabinets and coat racks visible along the walls as the character moves toward the staircase entrance.

scene_state.functional_zone: grand wooden spiral staircase with stained glass windows

events.description: entering the wooden staircase area from the common room archway

agents.ego_description: climbing the spiral wooden staircase alongside other students

notable_agents.action: student in dark robes walking up the stairs ahead

entered.detail: ornate wooden spiral staircase with carved banisters
tall stained glass windows with colorful heraldic designs
overhead wooden balcony railing visible from below

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the grand wooden spiral staircase, illuminated by colorful stained glass windows. The staircase features intricately carved wooden banisters and paneling, with other students visible walking ahead toward the upper levels.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper balcony overlooking the common room

events.description: emerging onto the balcony walkway with view down to the common room

agents.ego_description: walking along the balcony and looking down at the common room from above

entered.detail: stone parapet railing overlooking the lower level
overhead view of the common room fireplace and seating area below

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto an upper balcony walkway that overlooks the main common room from above. From this vantage point, the fireplace and seating area are visible below, while stone railings and wooden beams frame the view.

scene_state.functional_zone: stone corridor with gothic arches leading to spiral staircase

events.description: transitioning from wooden panelled balcony to stone corridor
beginning ascent of stone spiral staircase toward the dormitory

agents.ego_description: walking through the stone corridor and climbing the spiral staircase to the dormitory level

entered.detail: rough-hewn stone walls with gothic architectural details
pointed stone archways leading to different areas
large vertical tapestry with unicorn and forest scene
narrow stone spiral staircase with worn steps

segments.scene_description: The character moves from the wooden balcony into a narrower stone corridor with gothic arches and tapestries on the walls. The environment shifts from wood to stone architecture as the character approaches and begins climbing a stone spiral staircase leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: circular dormitory tower room with beds

events.description: entering the dormitory room through wooden doors at the top of the stairs

agents.ego_description: entering the dormitory and looking around the circular tower room

entered.detail: four-poster wooden beds with red hangings arranged in a circle
curved stone walls with multiple tall windows
tall wooden wardrobes for student belongings
exposed wooden beams supporting the conical roof

segments.scene_description: The character enters a circular dormitory tower room at the top of the stairs, featuring wooden four-poster beds arranged around the perimeter, tall windows letting in bright natural light, and exposed wooden ceiling beams. The room has a cozy, enclosed feeling with stone walls and wooden furnishings.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the expansive, warmly lit Gryffindor common room up through the castle's architecture into a secluded dormitory tower. It begins by gliding through the spacious hall past red and gold tapestries and students relaxing by the fireplace, before narrowing as the camera passes a ghost drifting through a stone archway. The scene then ascends a grand wooden spiral staircase illuminated by colorful stained glass, eventually emerging onto a high balcony that overlooks the common room below. As the camera moves from the wooden balcony into a gothic stone corridor, the environment shifts toward colder masonry before climbing a final spiral staircase. The journey concludes as the camera enters a circular dormitory room, where the open scale of the castle gives way to a cozy space filled with four-poster beds and bright natural light.
